characters.name: Ava Gregory
characters.description: Ava GregoryBiographyGenderFemaleFamilyKaren Westerly(sister)†Bob Westerly(brother-in-law)†Bradin Westerly(nephew)Nikki Westerly(niece)Derrick Westerly(nephew)ResidencePlaya Linda, California, United StatesSeries InformationSeasons1•2Episodes26First1.01:"Pilot"Last2.13"What's Past is Prologue"Portrayed byLori LoughlinAva Gregoryis a main character in thefirstandsecondseasons of theWBdrama seriesSummerland. She datesJohnny Durant, and is the new guardian ofBradin,NikkiandDerrick Westerly. She is portrayed byLori Loughlin. She is a woman in her mid 30s who is raising her niece and nephews, Bradin, Nikki, and Derrick Westerly, after their parents' tragic deaths. She lives in a beach house with the children, her on again/off again boyfriend Johnny, her best friend Susannah, and another close friend, Jay. Ava has a very hectic life and also faces the stressful task of raising three children, who are all devastated at the loss of their parents and who deal with their loss in very different ways.

characters.name: Bob Westerly
characters.description: Bob WesterlyBiographyGenderMaleStatusDeceased †FamilyTed Westerly(brother)Ava Gregory(sister-in-law)Bradin Westerly(son)Nikki Westerly(daughter)Derrick Westerly(son)Karen Westerly(wife)†RomancesKaren Westerly(wife)†Series InformationSeasons1Episodes1Appearance1.01:"Pilot"Portrayed byJoseph KellBob Westerly is the deceased father ofBradin,Nikki, &Derrick. He was married toKaren Westerlyand is the brother ofTed Westerly. He is portrayed byJoseph Kell. In thePilotBob is seen arriving at the breakfast table to eat with his family. Later that night he calls his wife Karen to ask her for help with the damage from the flood on the road. Him along with his wife were killed that night in the flood.

characters.name: Bradin Westerly
characters.description: Bradin WesterlyBiographyGenderMaleFamilyBob Westerly(father)†Karen Westerly(mother)†Ava Gregory(maternal aunt)Ted Westerly(paternal uncle)Nikki Westerly(sister)Derrick Westerly(brother)RomancesSharon(kissed; former love interest, in Kansas)Sarah Borden(ex-girlfriend)Callie(ex-girlfriend)Faith(kissed; former love interest/met once)Erika Spalding(love interest/friend)OccupationSurferLifeguard(2.13; implied)ResidenceHogarth County, Kansas(formerly)Playa Linda, Southern California(currently)Series InformationSeasons1•2Episodes26First1.01:"Pilot"Last2.13:"What's Past is Prologue"Portrayed byJesse McCartneyBradin Westerlyis a main character in thefirstandsecondseasons of theWBdrama seriesSummerlandand one of the main protagonists. Bradin was born and raised in the country life of Kansas and laters moves to shining California during the time of his parents' death. He is the eldest son of the family. Lifeguard(2.13; implied) Playa Linda, Southern California(currently) Bradin copes with the loss by drinking and getting involved in drugs, earning a reputation as a wild child and certified “bad boy” by the media. For his surfing skills, he gets offered a sponsorship by a major company called 'Wave Crasher', a subsidary of the largerSurf Force, which he later turns down and sues (with Ava’s help) after it keeps controlling him. Otherwise, he is a sweet boy when caring wholeheartedly for others. He can be very awkward sometimes when speaking to people, as shown in some episodes; always stammering and trailing off. He also tends to be impulsive and persistent, like trying to be forward with both Callie and Erika when they outwardly refuse his advances.

characters.name: Cameron Bale
characters.description: Cameron BaleBiographyGenderMaleStatusSingleFamilyKyle Bale(father)RomancesNikki Westerly(girlfriend)Amber Starr(ex-girlfriend)Jordan(ex-girlfriend)ResidencePlaya Linda, California, United StatesSeries InformationSeasons1•2Episodes16First1.03:"Fireworks"Last2.11:"Safe House"Portrayed byZac EfronCameron Baleis a main character in theWBdrama seriesSummerland. He isNikki Westerly's best friend and on/off boyfriend, and lives with his troubled, divorced, alcoholicfather. He is portrayed byZac Efron. His parents divorced, and his father gained full custody. His father does not take the divorce well and begins to abuse Cameron. Cameron is a young man with tanned skin and blue eyes. He is average height and trim build, athletic and extroverted. He often wears t-shirts and shorts, usually paired with sneakers.

characters.name: Erika Spalding
characters.description: Erika SpaldingBiographyGenderFemaleFamilyUnnamed fatherRonnie Spalding(mother)RomancesJay Robertson(ex-boyfriend)Bradin Westerly(ex-boyfriend)ResidencePlaya Linda, California, United StatesSeries InformationSeasons1•2Episodes21First1.01:"Pilot"Last2.13:"What's Past is Prologue"Portrayed byTaylor ColeErika SpaldingisJay's girlfriend. She helps coachBradinwith his surfing. She leaves to take care of her mother, but returns and begins dating Bradin. She is portrayed byTaylor Cole. A Caucasian woman with olive green eyes and long, dark brown hair in waves. She mostly wears swimsuits in public when walking on the promenade or beach; sometimes, it's modest clothing when working on her odd jobs, like tank tops and pants with simple sandals or regular shoes. She has dated Jay for the majority of the first season, but she laters moves into her own place after having an argument with him at the beach house. Onwards in the second season, she began a brief relationship with Bradin, but later resigns due to both their age gap, and finding out someone saw them on the pier when they kissed. She is now friends with Bradin, being on good terms.

characters.name: Faith
characters.description: Faith CollinBiographyAliasesNoneBirthdateNoneGenderFemaleFamilyBryce Collin (brother)RomancesNoneOccupationNoneResidencePlaya Linda, California, United StatesSeries InformationSeasons2Episodes11First2x11: Safe HouseLast2x11: Safe HousePortrayed byDanielle PanabakerFaithCollinis a recurring character in thefirstandsecondseason of theWBdrama seriesSummerland. She is played by Danielle Panabaker. She went on a UCLA college campus tour with Bradin by tricking him. She tries to convince him that he should go to college and warns him about her sleazy bullying older brother, Bryce. She tells Bradin not to be like her brother and that there is more to life. He kisses Faith inSafe House, just cause. No romantic relationship arises between them as she decides she would rather go to Harvard than somewhere in California.

He lives withAva Gregory, and helps her out when she takes in her sisters kids. He is portrayed byRyan Kwanten. He is an Australian native, who lives with Ava in Playa Linda and is the "big brother" to the children. He was dating Erika, despite his notorious behavior for being a playboy.

characters.name: Karen Westerly
characters.description: Karen WesterlyBiographyGenderFemaleStatusDeceased †FamilyAva Gregory(sister)Ted Westerly(brother-in-law)Bradin Westerly(son)Nikki Westerly(daughter)Derrick Westerly(son)Bob Westerly(husband)†RomancesBob Westerly(husband)Series InformationSeasons1Episodes1Appearance1.01:"Pilot"Portrayed byMegan WardKaren Westerly is the deceased mother ofBradin,Nikki&Derrick. She was married toBob Westerlyand her sister isAva Gregory. She is portrayed by Megan Ward. In thePilotKaren is scene making breakfast for her family. Once they all sit down to eat her daughter gets a package from her sister saying she'll get to spend four days in California with her. Nikki goes to call Ava and then Karen takes the phone to talk to her to tell her that she doesn't approve of her daughter going to California. Later that night she is seen writing in her jounral when she gets a call from her husband saying he needs help with the flood damage on the road. She then leaves and is later killed that night along with her husband by the flood. It is later revealed that she never told Ava she made her the children's legal guardian. Ava & Karen back in the day

characters.name: Mona Canatti
characters.description: Mona CanattiBiographyGenderFemaleResidenceSummerland, California, United StatesSeries InformationPortrayed byCarmen ElectraMona Canattiis Johnny's partner, who invests in a bar with him and eventually asks him to move in with her. However in a tragic automobile accident Mona is killed leaving Johnny heartbroken. He changes the name of his bar to "Mona's Sandbar" in memory of Mona who transferred her share of the property to Johnny before she died.

characters.name: Sarah Borden
characters.description: Sarah BordenBiographyGenderFemaleFamilyAudrey Borden (mother)Steve Borden (father)RomancesBradin Westerly(ex-boyfriend)OccupationBallet dancerResidenceSummerland, California, United StatesSeries InformationSeasons1First1.04:"Into My Life"Portrayed bySara PaxtonSarah Bordenis a recurring character in thefirstseason of theWBdrama seriesSummerland. She is a troubled teen with drug issues, and problems with pathological lying. She becomes Bradin's girlfriend and pressures him into using drugs and having sex. She is portrayed bySara Paxton.

characters.name: Simon O'Keefe
characters.description: Dr. Simon O'KeefeBiographyFull NameDr. Simon O'KeefeAliasesDr. KeefeGenderMaleStatusAliveOccupationDoctorResidenceSummerland, California, United StatesSeries InformationSeasons1•2Episodes10First1.09:"Skipping School"Last2.06:"The Pleiades"Portrayed byJay HarringtonSimon O'Keefeis a recurring character in thefirstandsecondseason of theWBdrama seriesSummerland. He is the principal at Playa Linda Middle School. Simon O'Keefe resides in Playa Linda, where he he moved after completing school. After cancelling his trip to China and resigning after a slip-up from Nikki that hurt his feelings, he goes back and gets reinstated. He is the middle school teacher and moves in withAva Gregoryas her fiance, helping her with her niece and nephews. Simon makes good money and lives comfortably near the beach. Simon is a very conscious man, he takes care of the people he cares about. He is a kind and considerate person, always available to help someone in need. Simon is a very conscious man, he takes care of the people he cares about. He is a kind and considerate person, always available to help someone in need.

She isAva's best friend, business partner and roommate. She is portrayedMerrin Dungey. Susannah is close friends withAva Gregoryand they are roommates and business partners. characters.name: Susannah Rexford
characters.description: Susannah RexfordBiographyGenderFemaleStatusSingleResidencePlaya Linda, California, United StatesSeries InformationSeasons1•2Episodes26First1.01:"Pilot"Last2.13:"What's Past is Prologue"Portrayed byMerrin DungeySusannah Rexfordis a main character in thefirstandsecondseason of theWBdrama seriesSummerland. She isAva's best friend, business partner and roommate. She is portrayedMerrin Dungey. Susannah is close friends withAva Gregoryand they are roommates and business partners. Susannah is friendly and outgoing. Susannah is friendly and outgoing.

characters.name: Ted Westerly
characters.description: Ted WesterlyBiographyGenderMaleFamilyBob Westerly(brother)Karen Westerly(sister-in-law)Bradin Westerly(nephew)Nikki Westerly(niece)Derrick Westerly(nephew)Series InformationSeasons1Episodes1Appearance1.01:"Pilot"Portrayed byGlenn MorshowerTed Westerlyis the brother ofBob Westerly. He is portrayed by Glenn Morshower. In thePilot, Ted is seen at the funeral for his brother and his sister in law. He talks to Bradin about being stronger for his brother and sister. He then talks to Ava about how Karen gave her the kids instead of him and his wife.
